examples.title: Cross-modal Attention
examples.description: Basic attention between text and image features
examples.code:
FUNCTION cross_attention(text_features, image_features):
    attention_scores = matmul(text_features, image_features.T)
    text_weights = softmax(attention_scores, dim=-1)
    attended_features = matmul(text_weights, image_features)
    RETURN attended_features
examples.explanation: Computes attention weights between modalities and combines features
